problem_statement: Teams need a simple, notebook-first way to validate GPT-4o multimodal capabilities before adding production architecture.
hypothesis: A staged notebook flow can validate text-only, local-image, and speech-in/speech-out scenarios with reusable patterns and clear learning-oriented code.
customer_scenario: An engineering team evaluates GPT-4o for multimodal assistant experiences and wants a low-friction prototype path with explicit teardown.
data_requirements: Synthetic prompts and local sample media files only.
security_notes: Feasibility demo only. Keep media inputs non-sensitive. Do not commit env/.env or generated outputs containing credentials.
